name: D1 Ch8 — Grand Cavern Wandering Monsters, Eastern Half (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for the Eastern Half of the Grand Cavern (encounter area Q-18/19), Chapter 8 of D1-2. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d4 on this table. Standard stats: Bugbear AC 3, hp 14, Dmg 4-10/2-8, XPV 191; Troglodyte hp 12, XPV 60; Troll hp 28, XPV 749.

results.text: Bugbears (2–12); AC 3, hp 14 each, Dmg 4-10 (morning star) or 2-8 (throwing spear), XPV 191 each
